message:
fix(distributed): prevent torn read in apply_distributed_snapshot

region.rs: apply_distributed_snapshot now acquires the write lock
BEFORE updating the atomic state, so concurrent readers never see
new state with old inner data (tasks, children, budget). Previously,
the atomic state was published first, creating a window where readers
saw inconsistent state vs inner fields.

Also: fix u64/u32 test type mismatch in bridge.rs, allow too_many_lines
in test_log_schema.rs validation function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
